blockingIssues.description: lib/exhaust.ml:142: expr_type_name only recognizes identifiers, enum paths, and direct function calls, so let-bound enums initialized from other enum-producing expressions (for example block expressions) can be omitted from the exhaustiveness type environment. Later matches on those values may still skip non-exhaustive coverage checks when arm patterns do not reveal the enum type.

rejectedObservations.observation: Clarify the canonical .factory/services.yaml path because one transcript attempted /home/lenstr/.factory/services.yaml before reading the repo-local file.
rejectedObservations.reason: The mission and system reminders already specify the repo-root .factory/services.yaml path; this looks like a one-off tool-path mistake rather than a systemic documentation gap.
